html.description: Root element of every HTML document.

head.description: Contains metadata: title, links, scripts — nothing visible.

body.description: All visible page content lives here.

main.description: The primary content of the document. One per page.

section.description: A thematic grouping of content, usually with a heading.

article.description: Self-contained content that makes sense on its own (blog post, card).

aside.description: Content tangentially related to the main content (sidebar, callout).

header.description: Introductory content or navigational aids for a page or section.

footer.description: Footer for a page or section — copyright, links, contact.

div.description: Generic block-level container with no semantic meaning.

h1-h6.description: Section headings. h1 is the most important, h6 the least.

a.description: Hyperlink — navigates to a URL or anchor.

strong.description: Important text, rendered bold by default.

em.description: Emphasized text, rendered italic by default.

span.description: Generic inline container — no semantic meaning, used for styling.

pre.description: Preformatted text — preserves whitespace and line breaks.

blockquote.description: A block of quoted content from another source.

br.description: Line break — use sparingly, prefer CSS margins.

li.description: A list item inside ul, ol, or menu.

dl.description: Description list — pairs of terms and definitions.

dt.description: The term in a description list.

dd.description: The definition/description paired with a dt term.

img.description: Embeds an image. Always include alt for accessibility.

video.description: Embeds a video with optional controls.

figure.description: Self-contained media content, often with a caption.

picture.description: Container for responsive images with multiple sources.

form.description: A collection of inputs that submit data to a server.

input.description: Interactive control — text, email, checkbox, radio, file, and more.

label.description: Associates a text label with a form control.

button.description: A clickable button — submit, reset, or generic.

fieldset.description: Groups related form controls with an optional legend.

table.description: Displays tabular data in rows and columns.

thead.description: Groups the header rows of a table.

tbody.description: Groups the body rows of a table.

tr.description: A table row containing th or td cells.

th.description: A header cell — bold and centered by default.

td.description: A data cell in a table row.

font-size.description: Sets the size of the font.

font-weight.description: Sets the boldness of the font.

font-family.description: Sets the typeface. List fallbacks separated by commas.

line-height.description: Sets the height of a line of text. Unitless values are recommended.

text-align.description: Aligns inline content horizontally within a block.

text-decoration.description: Adds underline, overline, or line-through to text.

width-height.description: Sets the size of an element's content box.

max-width.description: Caps the maximum width — essential for readable text columns.

padding.description: Inner space between content and border. Shares the background.

margin.description: Outer space between element and its neighbors.

box-sizing.description: Controls whether padding/border are included in width/height.

overflow.description: What happens when content exceeds the element's box.

display-flex.description: Turns an element into a flex container. Children become flex items.

flex-direction.description: Sets the main axis — row (horizontal) or column (vertical).

justify-content.description: Aligns items along the main axis.

align-items.description: Aligns items along the cross axis (perpendicular to main).

flex-wrap.description: Allows flex items to wrap onto multiple lines.

gap.description: Sets spacing between flex (or grid) items.

align-self.description: Overrides align-items for a single flex item.

display-grid.description: Turns an element into a grid container.

grid-template-columns.description: Defines the number and size of columns.

grid-template-rows.description: Defines the number and size of rows.

grid-column.description: Sets which columns a grid item spans.

grid-row.description: Sets which rows a grid item spans.

place-items.description: Shorthand for align-items + justify-items — centers grid children.

background.description: Shorthand for all background properties — color, image, position, size.

border-radius.description: Rounds the corners of an element's border.

box-shadow.description: Adds shadow effects around an element's frame.

opacity.description: Sets the transparency of an element (0 = invisible, 1 = full).

transform.description: Applies 2D/3D transformations — translate, rotate, scale, skew.

cursor.description: Changes the mouse cursor appearance over an element.

position.description: Sets the positioning scheme for an element.

top-right-bottom-left.description: Offsets a positioned element from its containing block.

z-index.description: Controls the stacking order. Higher values appear on top.

inset.description: Shorthand for top + right + bottom + left. Sets all four at once.
